message:
chore(ci,deps): pin GH Actions to SHA digests and bump dependencies

Pin all workflow action references to full SHA digests with version
comments (checkout v6, rust-cache v2.9.1, upload-artifact v7), bump
clap and clap_complete to 4.6.0, tracing-subscriber to 0.3.23, and
assert_cmd to 2.2.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,12 +22,12 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@efa25f7f19611383d5b0ccf2d1c8914531636bf9
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
           components: rustfmt, clippy
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
       - run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
       - run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
@@ -39,22 +39,22 @@ jobs:
       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-14, windows-latest]
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561

+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@efa25f7f19611383d5b0ccf2d1c8914531636bf9
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
       - run: cargo test
 
   audit:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@efa25f7f19611383d5b0ccf2d1c8914531636bf9
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
       - run: cargo install cargo-audit --locked
       - run: cargo audit
 
@@ -82,16 +82,16 @@ jobs:
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
             artifact: tr.exe
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@f7ccc83f9ed1e5b9c81d8a67d7ad1a747e22a561

         with:
           toolchain: nightly
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           key: ci-${{ matrix.target }}
       - run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
-      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
         with:
           name: tr-${{ matrix.target }}
           path: target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact }}

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'push'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
         with:
           fetch-depth: 1
 
@@ -55,7 +55,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "Computed SHA256: $SHA256"
 
       - name: Notify ACFS
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@28959ce8df70de7be546dd1250a005dd32156697 # v4.0.1
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install shellcheck
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y shellcheck

@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ jobs:
       tag: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}

     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
       - name: Determine and validate tag
         id: tag
         run: |
@@ -86,14 +86,15 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@efa25f7f19611383d5b0ccf2d1c8914531636bf9
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
       - name: Install musl-tools (Linux musl only)
         if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools
-      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@c19371144df3bb44fab255c43d04cbc2ab54d1c4 # v2.9.1
         with:
           shared-key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
       - name: Build
@@ -118,7 +119,7 @@ jobs:
           Compress-Archive -Path target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/toon.exe -DestinationPath dist/${{ matrix.asset_name }}.zip
           $hash = (Get-FileHash dist/${{ matrix.asset_name }}.zip -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.ToLower()
           "$hash  ${{ matrix.asset_name }}.zip" | Out-File -FilePath dist/${{ matrix.asset_name }}.zip.sha256 -Encoding ascii -NoNewline
-      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
         with:
           name: dist-${{ matrix.target }}
           path: dist/*
@@ -133,9 +134,11 @@ jobs:
     # Skip pre-releases
     if: ${{ !contains(needs.plan.outputs.tag, '-') }}
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
 
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly

+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Verify version matches tag
         run: |
@@ -172,10 +175,10 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

         with:
           path: artifacts
           pattern: dist-*
@@ -187,7 +190,7 @@ jobs:
           cat *.sha256 | sort > checksums.txt
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@153bb8e04406b158c6c84fc1615b65b24149a1fe # v2.6.1
         with:
           tag_name: ${{ needs.plan.outputs.tag }}
           name: toon_rust ${{ needs.plan.outputs.tag }}
@@ -222,7 +225,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Trigger formula update
         if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@ff45666b9427631e3450c54a1bcbee4d9ff4d7c0 # v3
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@28959ce8df70de7be546dd1250a005dd32156697 # v4.0.1
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap
@@ -253,7 +256,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Trigger manifest update
         if: steps.check.outputs.skip != 'true'
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@ff45666b9427631e3450c54a1bcbee4d9ff4d7c0 # v3
